summary:
**PASS** ✅

### The Bug (Needle)

In `/app/app/app.py`, the offset calculation had an off-by-one error:

```python
# BUGGY
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)

# FIXED
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

The extra `- (1 if page > 1 else 0)` subtracted 1 from the offset for any page beyond the first. This caused page 2 to start at index 9 (ID 10) instead of index 10 (ID 11), creating an **overlap** — the last item of page 1 was duplicated as the first item of page 2. The fix removes that spurious adjustment, restoring standard pagination logic.
